zh.Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.Alveley, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾阿爾維勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Cotton於1335年出生在英國爾盧德亞斯時，她的父親Hugh de Cotton20歲，母親Isabel Heaton17歲。她於1361年之後與Hugh de Venables在英國爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1398年在英國爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.Alveley, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾阿爾維勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Cotton于1335年出生在英国爾盧德亞斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Cotton20岁，母亲Isabel Heaton17岁。她于1361年之后与Hugh de Venables在英国爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1398年在英国爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

variants.name: Cotten
meanings: Altered form of German Kotten, a habitational name from any of several places so named in Rhineland, Westphalia, Silesia, etc., or perhaps an American shortened form of composite German surnames such as Kottenhagen, Kottenhoff, Kottenkamp (see Koth ).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

variants.name: Cotham
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cottam
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): variant of   Cotton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Cotton was born in 1335, in Rudheath, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Cotton, was 20 and her mother, Isabel Heaton, was 17. She married Hugh de Venables after 1361, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1398, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Cotton est née en 1335, à Rudheath, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Cotton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabel Heaton, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Venables après 1361, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1398, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Cotton 1335 in Rudheath, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Cotton 20 und ihre Mutter Isabel Heaton 17. Sie hat nach 1361 in Cheshire, England Hugh de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1398 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Cotton è nata il nel 1335 nel Rudheath, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Cotton, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabel Heaton, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Venables dopo il 1361, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1398, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Cottonが1335年にイギリスチェシュアイアルドヒースで生まれた時，父Hugh de Cottonは20歳，母Isabel Heatonは17歳であった。1361年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアでHugh de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1398年にイギリスチェシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Cotton(이)가 1335년 영국 체실르 루드히스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Cotton(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Heaton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1361년 이후 영국 체실르에서 Hugh de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 영국 체실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Cotton nasceu em 1335, em Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Cotton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Heaton, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Venables após 1361, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1398, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Cotton родилась в 1335 г. в местности рудхит, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Cotton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Heaton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Venables после 1361 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1398 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Cotton nació en 1335, en Rudheath, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Cotton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabel Heaton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Hugh de Venables después de 1361, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1398, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
